message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and regenerate CBOR test vectors

- Update Cargo.lock to include fcp-sdk dependency added to the
  telegram connector in the preceding commit
- Regenerate enrollment and simulate request CBOR test vectors
  with current key material (second regeneration pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
